title: lespedeza juncea subsp. sericea
intro: Lespedeza juncea subsp. sericea, also known as silky bushclover, is a perennial legume plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its seeds are used as a food source and for their potential to improve soil health.
